programs.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programs.desc: Kirstie and Phil look back at Catherine and Nigel's dated, 70s-style bungalow in Larne. Was the addition of a garage a love-it game changer.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: Land surveyor Moony hosts a Pakistani evening, with family recipes and an authentic seating arrangement on the floor of his specially dressed dining room.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: Driving instructor Christine's guests are dreading her meat-free menu, while Christine is anxious about Rosie's feedback after she compared Moony's food to vomit.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: Mobile hairdresser Ben plans a gourmet night, as he entertains his guests with his amazing body art, cooking skills and pet crabs.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: Fridge salesman Gregory serves up a Spanish menu and a charm offensive.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: Rosie has ruffled feathers all week. Now it's her guests' turn to scour every element of her Brazilian night, from the samba dancers to her authentic pig-ear stew.
